title: AEP Dynamic Config Overlay
description: Runtime override schema enforced by AepDynamicConfigService. This schema documents the mutable overlay surface used by server and embedded/library deployments; AEP does not currently expose a public remote config mutation API.

rabbitmq.port.description: RabbitMQ TCP port. Must parse to an integer in the inclusive range 1-65535.

redis.port.description: Redis TCP port. Must parse to an integer in the inclusive range 1-65535.

db.pool.size.description: Database connection pool size. Must parse to an integer in the inclusive range 1-200.

consolidation.interval.hours.description: Learning consolidation cadence in hours. Must parse to a positive integer.

KAFKA_BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS.description: Comma-separated Kafka broker list in host:port form. Each broker entry must pass the shared AEP host:port validator.

APP_ENV.description: Application environment. Validation is case-insensitive in code; documentation uses canonical lowercase values.
